overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character running continuously through urban Los Santos at dawn after rain. The character traverses wet streets, commercial districts with storefronts, and open roads with mountain backdrops.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge sidewalk with city skyline views

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the wet sidewalk of an overpass with the city skyline visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: standing near the traffic light pole waiting to cross

wet concrete pavement along the bridge
dense green bushes on the roadside
large mountain range visible in the hazy distance
tall metal street lamp along the road
traffic signal on metal pole at intersection
concrete and metal safety railing along the bridge edge
distant downtown skyscrapers visible through haze

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a wet bridge sidewalk at dawn, with mountains in the background and the city skyline visible in the distance. A pedestrian stands near a traffic light as the character passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with furniture store and pharmacy

events.description: turning right at the street corner near the laundromat building

agents.ego_description: sprinting past storefronts including a furniture store and pharmacy, navigating the sidewalk

single-story building with green PHARMACY signage
striped metal awning over store windows
tall palm trees lining the street
building with LAUNDROMAT signage on the corner

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a commercial district with storefronts including Aladdin Furniture and a Pharmacy. The character turns right at a corner near a laundromat, passing a pedestrian in an orange shirt.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban road with cab company and billboards

events.description: crossing the multi-lane road in front of the Downtown Cab Co building
crossing another street intersection with palm trees visible

agents.ego_description: running across streets and along sidewalks, passing the Downtown Cab Company and navigating around pedestrians

large commercial billboard above the street

segments.scene_description: The character crosses multiple streets in a more open urban area, passing the Downtown Cab Company building and large billboards. Palm trees line the street as mountains loom in the background, and the character navigates around other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: open road with mountain backdrop and grass median

agents.ego_description: sprinting along the sidewalk with a grass median to the left and mountains dominating the background

notable_agents.action: woman in black dress walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

entered.detail: strip of green grass between sidewalk and road

segments.scene_description: The character continues running along a more open road with a grass median and dense palm trees. The mountains are prominent in the background as the character passes another pedestrian, with the urban environment giving way to a more natural setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wet urban landscape that gradually shifts from a dense commercial district toward a more open, nature-fringed road. It begins with the character running along a damp bridge sidewalk at dawn, with the city skyline and distant mountains framing the horizon. As the character moves forward, the scene transitions into a commercial district filled with storefronts like Aladdin Furniture and a pharmacy, turning a corner past a laundromat and a pedestrian in an orange shirt. The environment then opens up into a wider urban area where the camera passes the Downtown Cab Company building and large billboards under the shade of lining palm trees. Finally, the urban density gives way to a road with a grass median and dense palms, with the mountains becoming more prominent as the character leaves the city center behind.
